headline: Shares of wearable health device stocks are trading higher following a post on X suggesting HHS Secretary RFK Jr. will launch a campaign to encourage Americans to use wearable health devices.
summary: Shares of wearable health device stocks are trading higher following a post on X suggesting HHS Secretary RFK Jr. will launch a campaign to encourage Americans to use wearable health devices.

headline: Can the Colt Tie-Up Fuel Ciena's Quantum-Secure Expansion?
summary: CIEN helped deliver a quantum-safe 800GbE data trial across 6,900 km between New York and London, marking a transatlantic security and speed milestone.
